name: @ont/light-client
description: ONT light-client verify core - thin client-facing proof-bundle orchestration over @ont/consensus.

scripts.test: npm run build -w @ont/protocol && npm run build -w @ont/bitcoin && npm run build -w @ont/wire && npm run build -w @ont/consensus && npm run build -w @ont/launch-config && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-header && vitest run
